title: Hover label names in "Concluded Configuration" colors
excerpt:
Hi! When we set the “concluded” colors / labels it is really difficult, even more for color blinded people. 
  
Could we have hovering labels text over the colored squares to easy pick them? 
Thanks!

posts.author: JoseDaher (Jose Daher)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi! When we set the “concluded” colors / labels it is really difficult, even more for color blinded people.

image507×217 9.67 KB

Thanks!
